summary: Correct the AI panel proposal presentation to reuse the existing per-hunk CodeMirror diff flow, so Apply edit requires explicit hunk choices and returns the exact merged source.

decisions.decision: Pending AI code proposals use ExternalChangeDiff's inline per-hunk accept/reject controls; the panel marks the proposal accepted only after the merged source is applied and passes that exact source to onApplyEdit.
decisions.rationale: The prior panel button directly accepted a whole proposal and did not satisfy FR-10.4's diff-review requirement. Reusing the already tested local diff component preserves one review authority and exact merged-buffer semantics.

testEvidence.criterion: The panel's diff review test fails before the final interaction sequence is corrected and passes after explicit hunk acceptance.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused AI panel suite once after adding ExternalChangeDiff and correcting its interaction sequence.

red.outcome: RED: 1 of 41 tests failed because the test attempted Apply hunk choices before accepting the inline diff hunk.

green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 1 passed (1); Tests 2 passed (2); Duration 1.03s.

testEvidence.criterion: The diff-integrated panel remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after the bounded correction.

red.outcome: RED: the first inline interaction assertion failed; the implementation and existing diff component rendered successfully.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 424 files in 211ms with source policy passed.

questions: The panel is still not wired to WorkbenchRuntime's current source and async provider context; hosted AC-10.b remains pending until that runtime seam is connected.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
